recommendations.title: The Central Park Five
recommendations.overview: In 1989, five black and Latino teenagers from Harlem were arrested and later convicted of raping a white woman in New York City's Central Park. They spent between 6 and 13 years in prison before a serial rapist confessed that he alone had committed t
recommendations.director: David McMahon, Ken Burns, Sarah Burns

recommendations.title: American History X
recommendations.overview: Derek Vineyard is paroled after serving 3 years in prison for killing two African-American men. Through his brother, Danny Vineyard's narration, we learn that before going to prison, Derek was a skinhead and the leader of a violent white supremacist

recommendations.title: Strings
recommendations.overview: María's routine at school is altered by the arrival of a very special child. Soon, they become close friends.

recommendations.title: Cape Fear
recommendations.overview: Sam Bowden witnesses a rape committed by Max Cady and testifies against him. When released after 8 years in prison, Cady begins stalking Bowden and his family but is always clever enough not to violate the law.

recommendations.title: White Boy Rick
recommendations.overview: The story of Richard Wershe Jr., a teenager who became an undercover informant for the police during the 1980s, and was ultimately arrested for drug trafficking and sentenced to life in prison.

recommendations.title: Collision
recommendations.overview: Over the course of one fateful day, a corrupt businessman and his socialite wife race to save their daughter from a notorious crime lord.

recommendations.title: Island of Fire
recommendations.overview: Someone in a prison run by a corrupt warden fakes the deaths of convicts to later use them as expendable assassins. A police officer is sent into the prison to gather evidence of the corruption.

recommendations.title: I've Loved You So Long
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending fifteen years in prison.

recommendations.title: Rambo: Last Blood
recommendations.overview: After fighting his demons for decades, John Rambo now lives in peace on his family ranch in Arizona, but his rest is interrupted when Gabriela, the granddaughter of his housekeeper María, disappears after crossing the border into Mexico to meet her b

recommendations.title: Crazy on the Outside
recommendations.overview: A recently paroled ex-con who has trouble adjusting to the wacky normalcy of life outside of prison. He has spent the last three years behind bars after getting caught committing a crime and taking the rap for his much more dangerous pal.
